evaluator_notes: Evaluated Topic 2 at commit 535ec42a246382bc3a5b9781c8bf4188425a5799. The worktree had unrelated dirty/untracked files, so evidence was read from the committed target tree with git show/git grep/git ls-tree, except for appending this evaluation line. New listed lifts were checked: test/GenericFutarchyToken.symbolic.t.sol and test/FutarchyArbitration.symbolic.t.sol are Solidity symbolic checks for Topic 3; .github/workflows/forge.yml is Forge unit/invariant CI for Topic 4; audit/dashboard/ is an audit/operator score UI outside the Topic 2 site-testnet scope; audit/agents worker profiles are process artifacts outside this rubric. The only Topic 2-adjacent movement is package.json adding dev/anvil/read-only e2e convenience scripts, scored as a small +0.2 D6 lift below the +0.5 reporting threshold. No regressions vs the prior Topic 2 JSONL entry. Binding gaps remain: every F1-F10 wallet flow is still test.fixme, active tests are read-only/route-mocked, no target-tree e2e fixtures/helpers/chaos or lockfile exist, no browser e2e CI is wired, and brittle class selectors remain in active specs.
